  ✖ cannot verify the dependency boundary for module src/infrastructure at src/infrastructure/dynamic.ts because analysis confidence is reduced (call target computed at runtime via a dynamic dispatch table) — resolve the dynamic construct or add an explicit declaration so the boundary can be checked.
